stimulus: In a 2022 experiment, researchers documented an intriguing response in the desert lizard Phrynosoma platyrhinos. When exposed to abrupt temperature drops, the lizard’s ______blank the specialized skin cells responsible for color change—rearranged to form a darker, heat-absorbing surface within minutes.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is the punctuation of a supplementary element within a sentence. The dash after “melanophores” pairs with the dash after “color change” to separate the supplementary element “the specialized skin cells responsible for color change” from the rest of the sentence. This element defines the term “melanophores.”

Choice A is incorrect because it fails to set off the supplementary element. Choice B is incorrect because a comma can’t pair with a dash. Choice C is incorrect because a semicolon can’t pair with a dash.
